info.title: Mailing List Service
info.description: Service for proxying GroupsIO operations to the ITX API

post.description: Check if an email address is subscribed to a GroupsIO subgroup

get.description: List GroupsIO services, optionally filtered by project UID

List members of a GroupsIO subgroup

get.description: Get a member of a GroupsIO subgroup by ID

put.description: Update a member of a GroupsIO subgroup

delete.description: Delete a member from a GroupsIO subgroup
